name: Takase Corporation
summary: Takase Corporation provides logistics services in Japan and internationally. The company offers warehousing, packing, customs clearance, and harbor transportation services; ocean, air, and inland cargo forwarding services; and truck transportation, international intermodal transportation, and shipping and airfreight agency services, as well as third party logistics, back office, and data processing services. It also operates as an agency for cargo insurance. The company was founded in 1872 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
